_source: x402-jpyc reference resource server (facilitator https://yen402.com), GET /api/markets. Real wire shape as emitted today.
_note: Live 402 carries the JP extension on accepts[] under the key `jp402` (no `x-` prefix), and it carries `tax`, NOT `invoice`. The invoice/registrationNumber lives in the OpenAPI discovery doc instead (see openapi-discovery-x-jp402.json). NB this deployment is still x402Version 1.
